name: SampleCheck5000
description: [SampleCheck5000](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1168) is a downloader with multiple variants that was used by [OilRig](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0049) including during the [Outer Space](https://attack.mitre.org/campaigns/C0042) campaign to download and execute additional payloads.
